nasb.text: Therefore, behold, I will bring strangers upon you, The most ruthless of the nations. And they will draw their swords Against the beauty of your wisdom And defile your splendor.

esv.text: therefore, behold, I will bring foreigners upon you, the most ruthless of the nations; and they shall draw their swords against the beauty of your wisdom and defile your splendor.

cnv.text: 所以我要使外族人， 就是列國中最強橫的人，來攻擊你； 他們要拔出刀來， 攻擊你用智慧得來的美物， 玷污你的光彩。

ccb.text: 我要使列国中最残暴的外族人来攻打你， 拔刀毁坏你凭智慧得来的美物， 玷污你的荣美，
